title: Lummobs!
body:
# Adds 6 new mobs, each with their own unique behaviors and gimmick!
![The Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20deefa97eab2d5e4c44a3ecd9261ab23e66c32d.png)
there are 3 hostile mobs found in the overworld. the Mini-Monsoons, the Cacus, the Oni, and one neutral mob, the Slabturtle, but the Cannonhead is found in the nether. The final mob is a powerful boss, the Monsoon. The Monsoon can be summoned the same way the Wither is, but with only one normal skeleton skull in the center instead.

**each mob has a unique fighting style:**

- Slab turtles take extra knockback and bounce off other mobs dealing damage.
- The Cannonhead shoots fireballs at the player and tries to dodge ranged attacks.
- Cacus will relentlessly chomp at the player slowing them down until they are completely immobilized.
- The Oni spawns deep underground and is very weak and docile, until provoked...
- The mini-Monsoons will fly at the player and blink to a new location when attacked.
- The Monsoon will spawn mini-Monsoons, levitate the player, and strike them player with lightning.

**showcase** <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fiUDJSQlF88" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
